rulings.Case Title: IN RE: URBAN REAL ESTATE GROUP, INCORPORATED A CALIFORNIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Second Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Real Estate Listing Contract; And Appointment Of Arbitrator
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 20, 2016, Line 1: PETITIONER URBAN REAL ESTATE GROUP, INCORPORATED'S Second Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Real Estate Listing Contract; And Appointment Of Arbitrator. OFF CALENDAR, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and the Court's June 22, 2016 minute order providing moving party an opportunity to comply with SFLR 2.7B. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MASAZUMI INOUE VS. PREFERRED MORTGAGE SERVICES et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 20, 2016, Line 2: DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., and WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to August 18, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a copy of the operative complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies must be provided to Department 501 no later than July 28, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)
